description_long: This is a pair of adjustable groove-joint pliers, commonly known as channel lock pliers, featuring two elongated handles coated in a blue-green rubberized material for improved grip and comfort. The jaws are offset and feature a curved, serrated gripping surface designed to hold pipes, bolts, or irregularly shaped objects securely. The head of the pliers is metallic, showing signs of wear and oxidation, and includes a visible slip-joint mechanism that allows the jaw width to be adjusted for different tasks. The handles are straight and parallel, with a slight ergonomic curve at the ends for better leverage. The pivot point is robust and reinforced, ensuring durability during heavy-duty use. No visible branding or logo is present on the tool.
description: A pair of blue-handled, adjustable groove-joint pliers with serrated jaws and a metallic, worn head. The tool features a slip-joint mechanism for adjustable jaw width and ergonomic, rubberized handles.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the open jaws, blue handles, and the slip-joint mechanism.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the length of the handles and the thickness of the jaws.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the handles and the back of the jaw assembly.
description_view_3: Top-down view clearly displaying the full length, jaw shape, and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated handles with blue-green rubberized insulation and slight ergonomic curvature at the ends.
attribute_jaw_design: Curved, serrated jaws with a groove-joint design for adjustable width; optimized for gripping round or irregular objects.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Slip-joint mechanism with visible grooves, allowing for adjustable jaw width and increased versatility.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized handles with a smooth, matte finish and subtle texturing for enhanced grip.
